generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing raw point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted from physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance IntelDeepSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel DeepSense D435i depth camera providing depth data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera data transmitted from physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal vehicle speed sensor providing real-time speed data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego-vehicle speed data transmitted from physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering-angle sensor providing real-time steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego-vehicle steering angle data transmitted from physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated by clustering and tracking algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for wheel steering"
]

instance ClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink implementation of DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filter tracking for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control model based on ISO 15622 for lead-vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for UI visualization of speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance UIEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "User Interface Enabler for remote management operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing time-series reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Translation Functional Entity for data serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportingService
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Data Collecting Functional Entity for ROS2 topic collection"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportingService
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Actuation Functional Entity converting desired speed into motor voltage commands and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering combined with Kalman filter tracking for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model based on ISO 15622 for lead-vehicle detection and speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI visualization of vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualInsight, PathProjectionInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC algorithm execution in DT to compute desired speed"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedCommand
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI-based control for enabling/disabling ACC, adjusting desired speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, AdjustSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of time-series reports stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportInsight
]

instance VisualInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, steering angle, and object tracks"
]

instance PathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path visualization for navigation"
]

instance DesiredSpeedCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Desired speed command for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Modify desired speed for ACC via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking command via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series reports for post-run analysis and parameter tuning"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "On-board Jetson hardware hosting physical twin components"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepSenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, VedderESC, SteeringServo, DataTranslationFE, ClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Off-board compute/cloud hosting digital twin components"
    base:contains ACCControlEnabler, DataCollectingFE, DataMonitoringEnabler, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "UI workstation for operator interaction"
    base:contains UIEnabler
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted with NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, Intel DeepSense D435i depth camera, and Vedder ESC for ACC case study"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "DT sends ACC control commands (desired speed, enable/disable ACC, emergency‑brake) and actuation voltage set‑points back to the PT over the same Wi‑Fi link; commands are issued by the Controlling FE (ACC) and Actuation FE and executed by the motor/steering actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with end‑to‑end network latency bounded to ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all DT components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A coordinated constellation where the Physical Twin Entity provides sensor data and actuation, the Digital Twin Entity hosts the ACC algorithm, data collection, storage and visualization, and the User Entity offers a 3D visualization and control‑panel UI; all entities communicate via standardized ROS2 interfaces and a Wi‑Fi link."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT supports the design/verification stage (simulation‑based testing), development stage (troubleshooting with data collection), and operational stage (runtime monitoring, control and remote management of the ACC system)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High‑fidelity sensor data (LiDAR point clouds) processed with DBSCAN/Kalman filter; ACC algorithm conforms to ISO 15622; latency ≤100 ms and clock sync ≤100 ms ensure temporal fidelity; safety‑critical nature imposes real‑time constraints and validation through on‑board testing."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Bidirectional Wi‑Fi link between PT and DT; intra‑entity communication via ROS2 (publish/subscribe) using the Data Translation FE for serialization and unit conversion; optional OPC UA mentioned as a possible transport but not used."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity runs on the on‑board NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity runs on an external compute platform (cloud or workstation) hosting ROS2 nodes for ACC, data collection, storage and visualization; User Entity UI runs on a workstation connected to the DT via the same network."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Architecture follows ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) entity model; ACC functionality complies with ISO 15622; communication latency benchmark follows 3GPP TS 22.185; ROS2 provides an open‑source middleware standard."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical operation mandates latency ≤100 ms and clock sync ≤100 ms; remote commands include emergency braking; however, specific cybersecurity mechanisms (e.g., authentication, encryption) are not described in the document."
]
